requirement_summary: Organize QA work by product and surface.
current_feature_summary: Projects with app types for web, API, Android, iOS, and unified coverage.
user_value: Keeps scope separated and easier to plan or review.

requirement_summary: Protect the workspace and manage admin/member access.
current_feature_summary: Local login, Google sign-in, email verification, users, roles, and project membership controls.
user_value: Lets teams control who can enter, manage, and update the workspace.

requirement_summary: Track product scope before test design starts.
current_feature_summary: Requirements with priority, status, coverage mapping, and linked test cases.
user_value: Makes it easier to see what is covered and what still needs tests.

requirement_summary: Speed up early test design from requirement context.
current_feature_summary: AI preview and generation flows for requirement-based test case drafting.
user_value: Reduces manual authoring time for first-pass test coverage.

requirement_summary: Create reusable test assets instead of one-off scripts.
current_feature_summary: Test cases with priority, status, parameter values, manual steps, web steps, and API steps.
user_value: Builds a reusable QA asset library instead of isolated checks.

requirement_summary: Avoid rewriting repeated setup or reusable flows.
current_feature_summary: Shared step groups plus local grouped steps inside cases.
user_value: Improves consistency and reduces duplication across cases.

requirement_summary: Group reusable cases into execution-ready flows.
current_feature_summary: Nested suites with suite-to-case assignment and ordering.
user_value: Helps QA teams shape release or regression packs quickly.

requirement_summary: Bring existing QA assets into the workspace.
current_feature_summary: Bulk import from CSV, JUnit XML, TestNG XML, and Postman collections.
user_value: Speeds migration from existing tools and files.

requirement_summary: Run, track, and review test execution progress.
current_feature_summary: Executions, execution schedules, assignees, statuses, case snapshots, and result history.
user_value: Turns design assets into visible execution evidence.

requirement_summary: Run tests with environment and data context.
current_feature_summary: Test environments, test configurations, and test data sets tied to project or app scope.
user_value: Improves repeatability and makes runs easier to reproduce.

requirement_summary: Keep proof and unstable areas visible after runs.
current_feature_summary: Execution results, pass/fail/blocked tracking, errors, logs, and hotspot visibility.
user_value: Supports release review, triage, and audit-friendly reporting.

requirement_summary: Connect QA work to external systems and services.
current_feature_summary: LLM, Jira, email sender, Google auth, and project sync workflows.
user_value: Keeps QAira connected to the wider delivery process.

requirement_summary: Capture improvement requests from users inside the tool.
current_feature_summary: Feedback records with title, message, status, and user attribution.
user_value: Creates a simple intake loop for tool improvements.

requirement_summary: Show current scope, reusable assets, and execution health in one place.
current_feature_summary: Dashboard, workspace transactions, and activity summaries.
user_value: Helps teams decide what to fix, design, or run next.
